blockingIssues.description: Market buy execution passes `quantity` from the quote-side input amount (USDC) instead of base-asset quantity (CASH), causing incorrect market buy sizing/failures.
Token selector excludes `excludeSymbol` from both list and popular row; with only CASH/USDC this leaves one selectable token and prevents selecting the opposite token.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure mission feature `skillName` values always map to actually installed/invokable skills (or provide a stable alias).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three reviewed swap-selector features were assigned `frontend-ui-worker`, but worker transcripts show `Skill "frontend-ui-worker" not found` and fallback to `frontend-worker`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align validator expectations between mission guidance and frontend worker skills (whether `pnpm build` is mandatory for this mission phase).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: frontend-ui-worker guidance requires build, while mission AGENTS.md validation guidance lists typecheck/lint; this mismatch caused procedural deviations in reviewed work.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add shared library note for react-window/react-virtualized-auto-sizer v2 API differences.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous scope for this scrutiny pass; recommendation captured but not applied directly.
